This Data Processing and Disclosure Control Notice for VietRenew Capital JSC (issuer preparing HOSE listing) governs processing of personal data under Decree 13 and controls for MNPI under the Securities Law of Vietnam and SSC guidance.
Controller: VietRenew Capital JSC, 12 Phan Đình Phùng, District 3, HCMC; DPO: Mr. Trần Quốc Minh; contact privacy@vietrenew.example.vn and +84 28 3 555 7711.
Categories of PII processed include employee/investor name, national contact details, payroll bank info, trading account refs, and device identifiers; sample refs: CIF 00 1 2 9, EmpID VRC-1 9 2 7, ACCT 04-**-7 3 9 0 1 at HoaBinh Commercial Bank.
Purposes include onboarding, payroll and reimbursement, AML/CTF screening, insider-list maintenance, information-barrier operations, investor relations scheduling, and transaction document execution.
Pre-public MNPI: draft ESG-linked green bond term sheet contemplates coupon 4.20–4.60% with carbon intensity step-up and a price adjustment formula tied to verified emissions baselines; these commercial terms are not yet filed with SSC/HOSE.
Non-public cyber incident signal: on 2026-05-28 our monitoring flagged unauthorised test access to the “ir_blackout” folder in the cloud archive; scope limited, remediation pending, and disclosure held behind the information barrier.
Crypto adjacency: internal pilot for tokenised receivables “VRC‑Token” on private SôngXanh Network with whitelist nodes; wallets w a l l e t - 8 8 1 0 and node: nx-0 3 are non-public and segregated from treasury systems.
Employees are subject to a HOSE blackout window from 2026-06-01 to 2026-06-30; tipping and selective disclosure are prohibited, and research/IR briefings must rely solely on public sources.
Insider list (restricted) currently includes Ms. Lan Thi Nguyen and Mr. Bao Vu for cyber-response and ESG bond modelling; list stored encrypted as L I S T - 2 2 and rotated upon deal-stage changes.
Information barriers: deal room segmentation applied; Research Team blocked from IR folders; access logs retained, and exceptions require DPO approval with SSC-compliant rationale.
Cross-border transfers: limited PII may be processed by CloudLotus Co., Ltd (SG) and DataBamboo Pte. for security monitoring; banking transaction extracts (masked) may be shared with auditors per engagement letter.
Retention: insider lists retained for 5 years; cyber event logs 2 years; HR onboarding records 10 years; purge via verifiable deletion and cryptographic hash attest (ref: h a s h - b l o c k - 3 1).
DSAR: submit via https://privacy.vietrenew.example.vn/a c c e s s?case=USR_0045x&ref=VRC-1 9 2 7 or email privacy@vietrenew.example.vn; we acknowledge in 72 hours and respond within 15 working days unless SSC proceedings require an extension.
Our ESG and cyber training modules use insider list vocabulary and crypto examples for education only and do not include deal-stage data or real-time trading signals.
No material adverse change is deemed to have occurred under the draft subscription agreement due solely to routine system patching, generic crypto marketing, or publicly available SSC circulars referenced in the IR handbook.
project management: esg sprint continues; cyber playbook v2 queued; crypto dashboard mockup reviewed; this is operational content and not a trading signal.
